title: $HTML_GENERATION
text: $HTML_GENERATION Set the number of comment lines Uniface inserts in a web page generated from a server page. $HTML_GENERATION { = } { MINIMAL | STANDARD | VERBOSE } Values MINIMAL —filters all comment lines; default. STANDARD —filters Uniface-generated comments lines. VERBOSE —instructs Uniface to include all comment lines in a Web page. Defaults Assignment file: server assignment files Section: [WEB] Default value: MINIMAL Description $HTML_GENERATION filters HTML comments, allowing differing numbers of comments during deployment and development phases, without recoding. Note: Comment lines inside <SCRIPT></SCRIPT> blocks are never removed by $HTML_GENERATION . The default is MINIMAL , which is applied when $HTML_GENERATION is omitted, a value is omitted, or an incorrect value is provided. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
